title: Herobrine Extreme
description: This mod adds the legendary herobrine.
body: Check out my main project: [**AppleCraft Ultimate**](https://modrinth.com/mod/applecraft-ultimate)—a massive content mod adding useful utility apples to your world! --- # Herobrine Extreme ### About I know there are *plenty* of herobrine mods already out there, but here's my take on it! I kept mine quite simple for now but I might add more later. The mod adds herobrine (of course) and some spawn effects when he spawns. Herobrine only spawns at night and it is rare to see him. ### Tips - If you see lightning in the sky at night and it's not a thunderstorm, I recommend getting inside *fast*. - In case you do see herobrine up close then you have two choices; run (he's fast) or fight (he's strong). ### Sources - **[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/project/herobrine-extreme/)** - **Curseforge**
